name: fmcord
description: FMCord - a fast lightweight slash-command Discord music bot with single live panel, custom emoji-aware red embeds, private music controls, YouTube/yt-dlp search, FFmpeg Opus playback, event-based now-playing panel updates, matching playback-start and now-playing section emojis, song/warn emoji aliases, voice channel status, and Docker Compose support.
author: Marcel R.
